garros.name: Garros the Western Knight
garros.description: A weathered knight from the western frontier. Speaks with a slow drawl and carries a heavy longsword. Loyal to a fault, but not the sharpest blade in the armory.

lyra.name: Lyra Shadowveil
lyra.description: A half-elf rogue with a silver tongue and quicker fingers. Raised in the undercity, she trusts no one — but once earned, her loyalty is unshakable.

thalric.name: Thalric Ashborn
thalric.description: A human mage who survived the burning of the Arcanum. Carries forbidden knowledge and a haunted expression. His fire spells are devastating but unpredictable.

borin.name: Borin Stonehelm
borin.description: A dwarven berserker from the deep mountain holds. Fights with twin handaxes and a roar that shakes walls. Drinks too much, sleeps too little, fights too well.

elara.name: Elara Dawnwhisper
elara.description: A half-elf cleric of the Order of the Silver Dawn. Gentle and compassionate, but her divine magic packs a serious punch against the undead.

kai.name: Kai Windstrider
kai.description: A wood-elf ranger who prefers the company of wolves to people. Tracks by scent and instinct. Few words, but every arrow finds its mark.

mira.name: Mira Songweaver
mira.description: A human bard with a voice that can charm dragons and a wit sharp enough to cut glass. Travels the land seeking the greatest story ever told.
